subject: Project Management
title: The Brooklyn Bridge
description: A short lesson to help you apply The Brooklyn Bridge.

hook.text: The Brooklyn Bridge took 14 years and killed its designer before work even started.

buildup.text: John Roebling died from tetanus after a ferry crushed his foot during site surveys.

discovery.text: His son Washington took over — then was paralyzed by decompression sickness.

twist.text: Washington's wife Emily secretly managed the project for years, earning engineers' trust.

climax.text: In 1883, 150,000 people walked across the longest suspension bridge in the world.

punchline.text: Three Roeblings, one bridge. The project outlived them.

quiz.question: Who secretly managed the Brooklyn Bridge project for years?
